findings: README says 'Six files land' but table lists 7 rows and installer installs 8 files including stampede-demo (README.md:77, install.sh:22-56)
stampede-demo installed by install.sh but NOT in README install table (install.sh:53-56 vs README.md:79-87)
exec stampede-demo auto-launches at end of install with no skip flag or documentation (install.sh:69-75)
PATH update is session-only: no persistent shell profile update documented or performed (install.sh:58-61)
No --check/preflight/dry-run mode; README backlog mentions this gap (README.md:171)
All 3 agents and all scripts correctly installed to documented paths (install.sh:22-51)
set -euo pipefail provides basic fail-fast; cp failures abort install (install.sh:2)
